cases.prompt: Play Store랑 App Store에 앱 출시 준비해줘

assertions.text: Produces store listing optimization (title/description/keywords/screenshots) and ASO strategy.
Runs a policy compliance pre-check against Google Play and Apple guidelines (e.g., 4.2 minimum functionality, Data Safety).
Requires explicit user confirmation before any irreversible production/review-track submission.

cases.prompt: Publish my app to the store and optimize the listing for ASO.

assertions.text: Walks the launch checklist (icon, screenshots, privacy policy URL, content rating) per store.
Flags common rejection reasons to avoid before submitting.
